seo.title: Temple Underground | Free First Class — Boxing & BJJ
seo.description: Temple Underground in Morristown, Tennessee. Integrated Vale Tudo-style training: boxing, Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, and combat conditioning. Your first class is free.

hero.subtitle: Boxing & Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu as one integrated combat system.

why.title: A complete system. A disciplined room.
why.description: Train in a coach-led environment built around beginner-friendly fundamentals, clear progression, and practical skill development across striking, grappling, movement, and community.

cards.title: Integrated striking and grappling
cards.body: Boxing, wrestling, and Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu taught as one Vale Tudo-style system — not separate silos.

cards.title: Breath, structure, and movement
cards.body: Foundational training pillars that carry into every class: breathing under pressure, solid structure, and efficient movement.

cards.title: Community built on accountability and respect
cards.body: A disciplined room where partners show up for each other — clear standards, honest feedback, and shared progress.

why.mainSiteLink: Explore programs on our main site

schedule.title: Train on your schedule
schedule.description: Weekday blocks for adults and kids, plus Sunday open mat for extra mat time.
schedule.openMatNote: Open mat is self-directed training: drill, spar, study positions, and train with teammates.
schedule.beginnerNote: New to martial arts? Start with any beginner-friendly class — your first visit is free.

pricing.title: Memberships built around how you train.
pricing.firstClassBanner: Your first class is completely free.
pricing.dropInDetail: Per class — great for travelers or trying the gym.
pricing.monthlyNote: Plans are built around how often you train. Consistency and open mat multiply the value.

tier100.detail: 1 weekday group class per week + Sunday open mat

tier150.detail: 2 weekday group classes per week + Sunday open mat

tier200.detail: Unlimited weekday group classes + Sunday open mat

cta.title: Take your free class
cta.description: Call, text, or email — or book online. We will help you pick the right class.

seo.title: Book Your Free Class | Temple Underground
seo.description: Reserve your free first class at Temple Underground in Morristown, TN. Tell us your goals and schedule — we will match you with the right training.

book.title: Book your free class
book.description: Tell us your goals and when you would like to train. We will reach out to confirm your first visit and place you in the right class.
book.success: Thanks — we received your request and will reach out shortly.
book.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us.
book.errorApi: We could not send your request right now. Please call or text us directly.
book.errorUnavailable: Online booking is temporarily unavailable. Call us at {phone}.

validation.timeRequired: Tell us when you would like to train.

etiquetteItems: Arrive on time and check in with your coach
Keep training areas clean and equipment organized
Respect partners and communicate intensity clearly
